answer:
The correct answer is **\boxed{B}**.

To convert the 1974 ending inventory to dollar-value LIFO, first adjust the 1974 inventory ($26,568) to 1969 base-year dollars using the 1969 price-level index (100%) and the 1974 index (108), then apply the LIFO layers from prior years. The calculation yields **$25,086**, matching option B.
